{"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant because the rejected design was one global mutex around all auth refresh work, and tests showed unrelated tenants must refresh in parallel rather than block each other.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"","message_id":"auth_fact_2"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex would serialize auth refreshes across different tenants, but auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.
